Scenario.overview: Energy Simple The attackers targeted the Ukrainian energy sector, compromising multiple organizations and disrupting power distribution.
Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets Active Directory Hacking Tool File Network Traffic
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: General Access Method Custom Command and Control Protocol PowerShell Script File Modification (Mechanism) Network Traffic Content (Mechanism)

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attackers exploited a vulnerability in the energy company's website to download malware.

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attackers exploited a vulnerability in the energy company's application to gain access.

stage.name: Execution
stage.technique_name: T1094: Custom Command and Control Protocol
stage.description: The attackers established communication with a C2 server to receive further instructions.

stage.name: Execution
stage.capec: CAPEC-108: Command Line Execution through SQL Injection
stage.description: The attackers executed PowerShell commands to gain elevated privileges.

stage.name: Impact
stage.capec: CAPEC-675: Retrieve Data from Decommissioned Devices
stage.description: The attackers deleted data on industrial control systems using KillDisk malware.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attackers disrupted power grid operations by causing a blackout.

Scenario.summary: The attackers compromised multiple energy companies in Ukraine, disrupting power distribution and causing widespread outages.
